title: Kerala High Court comes to aid of law students with attendance shortage
description: The Kerala High Court recently came to the aid of a group of law students who were barred from writing exams citing attendance shortfalls, after noting that the college was partly to blame since it had cut short the number of its working days [Vaibhav Y Kini & Ors. v. Mahatma Gandhi University & Ors.].Justice Bechu Kurian Thomas noted that the college, St. Dominic's College of Law, had failed to conduct classes for the stipulated minimum of 90 days.
